raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-affirmation / performative declaration aimed at mindset or somatic shift",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "the speaker has been suppressing energy/aliveness",
    "pleasure, creativity, and expression have been diminished or absent",
    "the speaker has been reducing self to accommodate others",
    "fear has been constraining expansion",
    "these changes are desirable and achievable through declaration"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent; all clauses reinforce a single theme of releasing internal constraints without contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "speaker's situation involves genuine suppression/fear patterns where repeated positive self-statements can support gradual behavioral or emotional change",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "speaker faces real external risks or trauma that require boundary-setting or professional intervention rather than internal permission statements"
}
